name: Easy Lord Baltimore Cake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FROSTING----------------------------------
1 1/2 cups Sugar
1/4 teaspoon Cream of tartar
1/2 cup Water
Dissolve Salt
3 Egg whites
1 teaspoon Vanilla
1/2 cup Crumbled soft coconut macaroons (3 cookies)
1/2 cup Chopped pecans
1/2 cup Chopped, drained maraschino cherries
Prepare cake mix according to package directions. Add orange extract.
Divide batter into three greased and floured 9-inch round baking pans. Bake at 350°F for 14-16 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove layers from pans. Cool on racks.
Mix sugar, cream of tartar, water, and salt in a large bowl until combined.
In another bowl, beat egg whites with an electric mixer until foamy. Gradually add sugar to the egg whites, beating until stiff peaks form (about 7 minutes). Beat in vanilla extract.
To the frosting mixture, gradually add remaining ingredients, mixing until smooth.
Spread half of the fruit frosting on one layer of cake, cover with second layer. Spread remaining fruit frosting on top and frost entire cake with plain frosting.
